question: Give me all titles of chamber opera that foresee at least one cello
sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
SELECT ?expression ?title WHERE {
  ?expression efrbroo:R12i_realises ?genre.
  ?genre a efrbroo:F11_Segment.
  ?genre efrbroo:U12_has_genre <http://data.doremus.org/vocabulary/redomi/genre/opera_de_chambre>.
  ?expression efrbroo:U2_foresees_use_of_medium_of_performance ?medium.
  ?medium rdfs:label ?label.
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label), "cello"))
  ?expression dct:title ?title.
}
execution_result: Got no rows and 2 columns in 0.53s
